gigapan.description:
Testing a Canon T2I.  55 mm lens, 77 pictures.

Used manual focus, just under infinity.  Setting focus this way is sort of hard to
set.

In theory the maximum resolving power of the lens, the sweet spot, is a few stops down from fully open, and then focus at the hyperfocal distance.
